_publications._publicationTitle: Longitudinal evaluation of quality of life in 288 patients with neurofibromatosis 2.

_contextSnippet: Examination of longitudinal changes indicated that any NFTI-QOL score change up or down of greater than five points would be statistically significant for an individual
details: Any NFTI-QOL score change greater than five points up or down would be statistically significant for an individual patient
